# Documentation Page Template

Use this template for new or updated documentation pages to keep metadata and format consistent.

---
Title: Short, descriptive title
Summary: One-sentence summary of the page (what it covers)
Status: Draft / Stable / Deprecated
Last-Updated: YYYY-MM-DD
Maintainer: Name or team
Tags: architecture, sms, guide, quick-start
Related: link1.md, link2.md
---

# Title

Summary paragraph explaining the purpose of this page.

## When to read this

Who should read this and why.

## Quick steps / TL;DR

- Step 1
- Step 2

## Full details

Detailed explanation, architecture, code snippets, conclusions.

## Examples

Include small, runnable code snippets where appropriate. Use fenced code blocks and indicate the language (e.g. ```dart).

## Links & References

- Link to related docs
- Link to source files (e.g. `lib/...`)

## Changelog

- YYYY-MM-DD — Created by NAME
